title: lemna minuscula
intro: Lemna minuscula, also known as the lesser duckweed, is a small floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Lemnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lemna minuscula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to help lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal issues.
